name: Gold Ship, The Bat Shit Insane, Like No Genuinely Who Made This Hoe So Crazy
description:
How Gold Ship Feels After Throwing 3 Races In A Row, Only To Get 1st After Using Up All My Alarm Clocks:

(Discord Here)

Gold Ship Or Power, Who's More Psych Ward Worthy?

Anyways, You're A Regular Old Trainer, When Suddenly...

This 5'7", Unmeasurably Heavy BRICK Of Japanese Born And Bred Excellence Appears. From Where? Beats Me Dawg, But Now She’s YOUR Problem. Just Don’t Ask Her What She Was Doing On January 3rd, 2026

RANT SECTION:

So, you might be wondering 'where to have you been?"

FREEDOM. LIBERTY. MANAGED DEMOCRACY. I'VE BEEN HELLDIVING AND low-key i forgot to post, plus i've also been posting on Insta and TikTok alot as of late. I've been prettying up my bots and my profile a bit tho, so I figured i may as well post here lmao
